case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. HEIDY JASMIN ALVARADO ESPINO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ALVARADO ESPINO, HEIDY JASMIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-16-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC-109(AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR) VERONICA ROSALES FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT HEIDY JASMIN ALVARADO ESPINO IS NOT PRESENT.
